subcodes.first_line: O thou who art present before the Throne and beholdest the Dawning-Place of the verses of thy Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise! Give thanks for that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الحاضر لدی العرش و الناظر مطلع آیات ربک العلیم الحکیم ان اشکر بما
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consolation and comfort
